channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
item.description: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/rakuten

item.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
item.description: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/designing-agents-to-resist-prompt-injection

item.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
item.description: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/equip-responses-api-computer-environment

item.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
item.description: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/wayfair

item.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
item.description: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/instruction-hierarchy-challenge

item.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
item.description: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/new-ways-to-learn-math-and-science-in-chatgpt

item.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
item.description: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-promptfoo

item.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
item.description: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/codex-security-now-in-research-preview

item.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
item.description: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/descript

item.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
item.description: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/balyasny-asset-management

item.title: Extending single-minus amplitudes to gravitons
item.description: A new preprint extends single-minus amplitudes to gravitons, with GPT-5.2 Pro helping derive and verify nonzero graviton tree amplitudes in quantum gravity. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/extending-single-minus-amplitudes-to-gravitons

item.title: How Axios uses AI to help deliver high-impact local journalism
item.description: Axios COO Allison Murphy explains how the company uses AI to support local reporters, streamline newsroom workflows, and deliver high-impact local journalism at scale. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/axios-allison-murphy

item.title: Understanding AI and learning outcomes
item.description: OpenAI introduces the Learning Outcomes Measurement Suite to assess AI’s impact on student learning across diverse educational environments over time. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/understanding-ai-and-learning-outcomes
